runs.note: Implemented CORS middleware to allow cross-origin requests from app.example.com and admin.example.com. Added ALLOWED_ORIGINS constant and updated handleCORS function to set appropriate Access-Control headers only for allowed origins, enabling credentials and handling preflight requests.
